# BCMS Starters

- Source repo: https://github.com/bcms/starters
- Vendored commit: fef4e1f24043a72418679b3cccc43a9d522f1055
- License: repository license, verify upstream before using outside eval/reference contexts
- Usage mode: source-proxy
- Deploy mode: hosted source proxy pages with public README screenshots and analytics interaction lab

The Astro starters require BCMS content/type generation (`bcms pull types lng ts`) to build as full sites. This corpus vendors the starter source for provenance and exposes source-proxy pages for external analytics/canonical mapping evaluation.
